subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Prisoner unto him who hath taken unto God a path for himself and hath believed in the Manifestation of His Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی اتخذ الی الله لنفسه سبیلا و آمن بمظهر نفسه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
